name: Quelites (Spinach with Beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the bacon drippings in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Stir in the prepared pinto beans, chili seeds, and salt.
4. Add the cooked fresh spinach and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the spinach has wilted slightly.
5. Slice the boiled egg and arrange the slices on top of the mixture.
6. Serve immediately.
